Scheduler Idle Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x148
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel scheduler idle status

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] SCHED_IDLE r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

SCHED_IDLE

Scheduler idle bits [7:0] - 1=idle, 0=active
